{{CargoRelic
|name=Conductor's Baton
|class_id=20630
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This small and exquisite conductor's baton is what the band members use during rehearsals, witnessing their dedication. After a hugely successful performance, it has become a limited edition merch that countless fans dream of.
|fame=15
|art=31
|fth=18
|civ=15
|tech=16
|ss1=Per partner you have, Snail HP +50<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Per partner you have, Snail HP +100<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Per partner you have, Snail HP +150<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Per partner you have, Snail HP +150<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Per partner you have, Snail HP +150<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
